title: Movie
desc: Bringing the best in television.

title: Movie
desc: Bringing the best in television.

title: Raja Jotak
desc: Pari is compelled to marry Rishi. In spite of the difficulties, she changes their relationship with her kindness and discovers acceptance within a strict, tradition-driven family.

title: Madhu Jhara
desc: The elder daughter of a family sacrifices love to raise her siblings and provide them secure life after her father's death.

title: Sathi Sata Janmara
desc: Archana's devotion to her marriage is tested when Savita's manipulations threaten to tear her and Dev apart, forcing her to fight for love against family pressures.

title: Suna Jhia
desc: A determined young woman with great aspirations must undergo the various challenges thrown at her on the path to fulfil her dreams.

title: Kichi Sata Kichi Micha
desc: Siblings Chhabi and Chaaya, grief-stricken and seeking vengeance, embark on a journey of retribution. Chhabi's quest to bring down the Mangaraj clan conflicts with her growing feelings for Alok.

title: Tu Khara Mun Chhai
desc: Manini aspires to become an actor, but is married off to Abhimanyu, a wealthy man. While they strive to cope with their different personalities, the couple also attempts to manage multiple relations.

title: Tuma Bina
desc: Lakshmi, an orphan, is chosen as a temporary bride for Akshay to counter a flaw in his horoscope. However, as Akshay falls in love with her, he is faced with a decision that could alter their futures.

title: Jagruti
desc: As an NGO teacher by day and crime branch officer by night, Jagruti juggles the responsibilities of two worlds. However, when both worlds collide, the lines between her identities start to blur.

title: Kaa Aage Kahibi Manara Katha
desc: Parag and Prakash secretly conspire to bring Simon down. As this dark plot unfolds, Parag's mother remains busy gathering community contributions for the festive puja celebrations.
